prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与该校物理类招生专 业高度重合，对报考有正向拉动；重庆2026年普通高考总人数约20.9万，较2025年物理类+历史类合计21.29万略降约1.8%，物理类考生估算约13.69万（较2025年13.95万减少约1. 85%），竞争压力略有缓解，2025年物理类本科批425分，近年波动不大；南昌大学位于江西省，在重庆招生占比约2.5%（2025年），属跨省招 生；重庆考生对省外211高校接受度较高，无明显地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类招生计划大幅缩减（-40.8%）这一最强影响因素，竞争加剧推动位次前移（ 数字减小）；同时重庆物理类考生总数略降（-1.85%）及学校声誉偏正面形成小幅正向支撑。，在此基础上考虑缩招幅度极大但考生基数略降，小幅修 正后预测最低位次约19649名，区间19149–20149名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 20102 → 17052 → 28698 → 25632 → 26280, showing significant fluctuations. In 2023, due to the first implementation of the new college entrance examination in Chongqing, the ranking dropped sharply to 28698, rebounded to 25632 in 2024, and slightly shifted to 26280 in 2025, stabilizing in the 2.5–2.6 million range in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 70 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 68 in 2023, 68 in 2024, and 76 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend. However, the 2026 plan is significantly reduced to 45 (including 45 for Physics Category and 25 for Medical Category mainly targeting Physics Category students), a decrease of about 40.8% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 74th, with stable rankings in the 69–78 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level comprehensive universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is relatively positive, mainly due to the men's volleyball team winning the championship in the CUVA University Volleyball League Finals, enhancing the university's sports image and public attention. Douyin popularity ranking is 43rd (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. In 2023, there was a low-attention discussion on admission score line comparisons, with no obvious record of score gaps. Food Science and Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), the only discipline above A- at the university. Medical fields (Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, etc.), Materials, Mechanical Engineering, and other engineering majors are traditional advantageous directions, but the discipline evaluation grades are mainly B-level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular and recommended, highly overlapping with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors, positively driving applications. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in Chongqing is about 209,000, a slight decrease of about 1.8% from the 2025 total of 212,900 (Physics + History categories). Estimated Physics Category examinees are about 136,900 (a decrease of about 1.85% from 139,500 in 2025), slightly easing competition pressure. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch score was 425, with little fluctuation in recent years. Nanchang University is located in Jiangxi Province, with about 2.5% of its enrollment from Chongqing (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Chongqing examinees have a high acceptance of out-of-province 211 universities, with no obvious regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strongest influencing factor of a significant reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (-40.8%), intensified competition pushes the ranking forward (smaller number). At the same time, a slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing (-1.85%) and a relatively positive university reputation provide minor positive support. Based on this, considering the large reduction in enrollment but a slight decrease in the examinee base, after minor adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19649, with a range of 19149–20149.

Popular majors such as Electrical, Electronic Information, etc., have actual admission rankings far below the university line, so you need to position yourself reasonably based on your own ranking.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking for Nanchang University's medical programs in Chongqing was 20,102 in 2021 (including the lowest score for Rehabilitation Therapy that year), sharply dropping to 4,155 in 2022, then rising year by year: 4,233 in 2023, 5,687 in 2024, and 5,621 in 2025. From 2022 to 2025, the overall trend is upward, with rankings rising from 4,155 to 5,621, reflecting the continuously increasing popularity of medical programs. In terms of enrollment plans, there were 32 students in 2021, 26 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 29 in 2024, and 31 in 2025, showing a stable increase overall. However, the plan for 2026 is reduced to 25 students, a decrease of about 19.4% compared to 2025, which is a significant reduction. According to the principle of supply-demand elasticity, this will lead to a decrease in admission ranking (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanchang University is a key national university under the Project 211 and a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Nanchang City, Jiangxi Province. It is a comprehensive university. Its medical school has a long history, and majors such as Clinical Medicine have a strong influence in the region, attracting some Chongqing candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors are consistently highly popular nationwide, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine, Anesthesiology, and Medical Imaging being particularly competitive. Chongqing candidates have a strong willingness to apply for medical schools under Project 211 outside the province, but Nanchang University, located in the central region, has slightly less geographical appeal compared to coastal medical schools. The reduction in medical enrollment in Chongqing in 2026 may further intensify competition for core majors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Nanchang University's medical programs in 2026 is approximately 5,068, a decrease in ranking number (easier to enter) compared to 2025 (5,621), mainly due to the significant enrollment reduction in 2026. The fluctuation range is 4,568 to 5,568. Candidates are advised to plan their applications within this range.
